evidence: "We have liked all of the seasons of Wyatt Earp that we have gotten. It was a great series"

summary: The user has a strong preference for westerns and adventure genres, enjoying shows with high production quality and emotional resonance. They favor slower-paced narratives that allow for rewatching and savoring the experience.
